dict.string: Sentio uses your Mac's location to check weather and sunrise/sunset times for smarter automation.
Sentio uses your Mac's location to check weather and sunrise/sunset times for smarter automation.
Sentio controls your HomeKit accessories to create the ideal environment based on your context.
Sentio plays ambient music through your speakers to match the mood of your environment.
Sentio reads your upcoming events to anticipate your needs — like quieting the house before a meeting.
Sentio routes music to your speakers by controlling Apple Music's AirPlay output.
Sentio scans for nearby Bluetooth devices to detect when guests are present and adjust your home accordingly.
Sentio uses audio input to initialize its speech engine for routing voice output to specific speakers.
Sentio discovers devices on your network to detect guest presence and control smart home accessories.
